name: Simple File Read Tool Call
prompt: Read the contents of the file at /tmp/test.txt
expected_behavior: Should invoke read/cat tool with correct file path

name: Read-Modify-Write Sequence
prompt: Read the file /tmp/data.json, add a new field "timestamp" with the current date, and write it back to the file.
expected_behavior: Should sequence: read file, modify content, write file

name: Search-Read-Act Nested Sequence
prompt: Find all TypeScript files in /home/user/project that contain the word "deprecated", read each one, and create a report listing the files and line numbers.
expected_behavior: Should search files, read matches, aggregate results, create report

name: Handle Invalid Tool Parameters
prompt: Read the file at /nonexistent/path/file.txt. If it doesn't exist, create it with the content "Hello, World!".
expected_behavior: Should attempt read, handle error, then create file with fallback

name: Parallel Tool Execution
prompt: Read three files in parallel: /tmp/a.txt, /tmp/b.txt, and /tmp/c.txt. Then concatenate their contents and write to /tmp/combined.txt.
expected_behavior: Should identify parallel opportunity, read files concurrently, then combine

name: Tool Parameter Validation
prompt: Delete the file /tmp/important.txt, but only if it's smaller than 1KB.
expected_behavior: Should check file size first, then conditionally delete
